terms.name: Continuity Plan
terms.definition: Version-controlled plan for critical function recovery

terms.name: Incident Level
terms.definition: Severity classification from minor to institution-wide emergency

terms.name: Emergency Operations Center
terms.definition: Temporary command center during major incidents

terms.name: Dependency Mapping
terms.definition: Visible mapping of critical function dependencies

terms.name: Alternate Personnel
terms.definition: Documented backup holders for critical roles

terms.name: Recovery Phase
terms.definition: Staged restoration from stabilization to full operations

terms.name: Resilience Exercise
terms.definition: Tabletop, drill, or simulation validating preparedness

terms.name: Backup Verification
terms.definition: Continuous integrity verification of institutional backups

terms.name: Readiness Index
terms.definition: Composite preparedness indicator for planning only

terms.name: Lessons Learned
terms.definition: Institutional knowledge from incidents and exercises

terms.name: AI Crisis Advisor
terms.definition: Advisory crisis support without operational command
